/usr/bin/c++  -DSIMDE_X86_AVX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_AVX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_F16C_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_FMA_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_GFNI_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_MMX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_PCLMUL_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE3_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_HAVE_COM_ -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_NATIVE -mno-avx512f -march=native -DSIMDE_X86_AVX2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_VPCLMULQDQ_NATIVE -march=native  -pipe -fPIC -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -rdynamic -Wno-packed-bitfield-compat -std=c++11  -O2 -g   -ggdb2 -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/zyzy/zy-OAI CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/executables/lte-ru.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/executables/ru_control.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/radio/COMMON/common_lib.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/radio/COMMON/record_player.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/executables/softmodem-common.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/openair1/SCHED/phy_procedures_lte_common.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/executables/main_ru.c.o CMakeFiles/oairu.dir/common/utils/lte/prach_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/shlib_loader.dir/common/utils/load_module_shlib.c.o -o oairu  -Wl,--start-group libSCHED_RU_LIB.a libPHY_COMMON.a libPHY_RU.a libUTIL.a -Wl,--end-group -lz -ldl -lpthread -lm libCONFIG_LIB.a -lrt common/utils/T/libT.a libUTIL.a common/utils/LOG/libLOG.a common/utils/threadPool/libthread-pool.a common/utils/libutils.a common/utils/actor/libactor.a libUTIL.a libCONFIG_LIB.a common/utils/T/libT.a common/utils/LOG/libLOG.a common/utils/threadPool/libthread-pool.a common/utils/libutils.a common/utils/actor/libactor.a common/utils/barrier/libbarrier.a -ldl -lpthread -lrt
